title: Maa Dewri Temple
tagline: Maa Dewri Temple — spiritual town of Jharkhand

overview.short: Maa Dewri Temple is an ancient temple, situated in Diuri village, Tamar near Ranchi in Jharkhand in India.
overview.description: Maa Dewri Temple is an ancient temple, situated in Diuri village, Tamar near Ranchi in Jharkhand in India. The main attraction of the temple is, 700 year old murti of 16-armed village deity Maa Dewri. It is an ancient temple and was renovated few years back. The ancient temple was constructed by interlocking stones without using chalk or binding material.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Maa Dewri Temple?
faq.a: The best time to visit Maa Dewri Temple is Oct – Mar. Summers are 26–40°C and winters are 12–28°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Maa Dewri Temple?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Birsa Munda Airport, Ranchi (47 km) and the nearest railway station is Ranchi Junction (51 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Maa Dewri Temple?
faq.a: 2 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Maa Dewri Temple at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Maa Dewri Temple?
faq.a: Stays in Maa Dewri Temple start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Maa Dewri Temple?
faq.a: The top attractions are Tamar, India, Tamar block.
